SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SPA") is made on this 15th day of November, 2023.

PARTIES:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC: S1234567A, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 234567, Tel: +65 6123 4567, Email: dr.tan.weiming@example.sg

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 456 Clementi Avenue 3, #05-67, Singapore 567890, Tel: +65 6789 0123, Email: siti.aishah@example.sg

3. Ramasamy Muthu, NRIC: S3456789C, residing at 789 Yishun Street 81, #10-11, Singapore 678901, Tel: +65 7890 1234, Email: ramasamy.muthu@example.sg

AND

ABC Ventures Pte. Ltd., UEN: 199812345A, with its registered office at 10 Anson Road, #33-01, International Plaza, Singapore 079903.

RECITALS:

WHEREAS, the parties wish to enter into this SPA to set forth their agreements regarding the management and operation of ABC Ventures Pte. Ltd.

WHEREAS, the parties acknowledge that the project plan does not constitute a binding commitment to proceed under this SPA.

AGREEMENT:

1. The parties agree to invest a total of SGD 1,000,000 (one million Singapore dollars) as part of the capital funding for ABC Ventures Pte. Ltd.

2. The SPA shall govern all future relations between the shareholders and the company.

3. Reference to https://example.sg/user/S2345678B confirms the unique participation of Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah in this agreement.
